summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Healthcare Booking Platform MVP - Backend APIs 100% functional, Frontend core flows working with some UI issues identified

fixed_issues.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error causing 500 response
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Added _id field removal after database insertion

ui_bugs.issue: React runtime errors: Select.Item must have value prop that is not empty string
ui_bugs.details: Red error overlay showing React runtime errors for Select components with empty string values

ui_bugs.issue: Button clicks intercepted by overlay elements
ui_bugs.workaround: Using force=True in clicks resolves the issue
ui_bugs.details: CSS overlay elements preventing normal button interactions

integration_issues.issue: No doctor cards displayed despite successful API response

passed_tests: Patient dashboard access and quick actions
Doctor discovery page and search functionality

critical_fixes: Fix React Select component errors in DoctorDiscovery.js - ensure Select components have proper value props (not empty strings)
Investigate why doctor cards are not rendering despite successful API responses
Fix CSS overlay issues preventing normal button clicks (or ensure force clicks are properly handled)
database_setup: Consider adding sample doctors to database for testing doctor discovery functionality
Verify doctor verification status affects display in doctor discovery
